content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all 18 changed files implementing milestone/bead lineage in run history and task detail queries. All 4 query types are implemented correctly: (1) run history with milestone_id/bead_id, (2) task detail with BeadLineageView including milestone name, bead title, and acceptance criteria, (3) bead execution history with retries and computed durations, (4) milestone task listing. Backward compatibility is preserved with null lineage for non-milestone tasks. All output types are properly serializable. The bead ref matching logic correctly handles short vs qualified refs (e.g., '8.5.3' vs '9ni.8.5.3') including the numeric milestone ID edge case. Error handling is robust with graceful fallbacks for missing/corrupt/stale plans. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and fmt --check passes. No bugs, safety issues, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
